overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a dense cyberpunk city environment. The character moves from an industrial platform through neon-lit alleys and emerges into a sunlit urban plaza beneath an elevated highway, showcasing the game's contrast between dark enclosed spaces and bright open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service platform with ventilation equipment

agents.ego_description: following an NPC across a metal industrial platform and climbing stairs to upper level

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego up the metal stairs

entered.detail: large circular industrial fan mounted on building wall
metal grating walkway with orange safety railings
metal barrel with open fire inside providing warm light
steep metal stairs with pipe railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an industrial metal platform with a large ventilation fan and burning barrel. The character follows an NPC across the platform and begins ascending a metal staircase, with the camera following in third-person perspective through the enclosed industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon restaurant signage

brighter neon lighting from restaurant signs becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley passing by a Korean restaurant and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera in the narrow alley

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign with Korean text and food graphics
white neon open sign above restaurant entrance
blue neon hotel sign visible down the alley
concrete stairs leading up to street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial area, the character enters a narrow commercial alley lined with neon signs including a prominent Korean BBQ restaurant. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial neon and ambient light as the character passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk back alley with intense green neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant green neon as character enters deeper alley
red paper lanterns become visible hanging overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow neon-lit alleyway with green fluorescent lighting

entered.detail: intense green fluorescent tubes lining the alley walls
traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead between buildings
illuminated vending machine with purple branding
closed metal security shutters on storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character enters a deeper section of the alley dominated by intense green neon lighting and traditional red paper lanterns. The environment feels more enclosed and cyberpunk in aesthetic, with vending machines and metal shutters lining the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: service alley with dumpsters transitioning toward open area

events.description: bright sunlight becomes visible at the end of the alley indicating exit to open area

agents.ego_description: walking past dumpsters and graffiti walls toward the bright alley exit

notable_agents.action: standing near the alley exit in the distance

entered.detail: large green metal dumpster overflowing with trash bags
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
small red indicator lights mounted on building wall
opening at end of alley leading to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a service alley featuring dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls. The lighting gradually transitions from neon to natural as bright sunlight becomes visible at the alley exit ahead, where a figure stands near the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza beneath elevated highway with market activity

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide open plaza with elevated highway overhead
dramatic shift from dark alley to bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit plaza past market stalls and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking alongside a child in the plaza

entered.detail: massive red concrete highway structure curving overhead
tall building covered in large digital billboards and video screens
tall palm tree in concrete planter
food carts and market stalls with vendors
traditional stone lantern structure near stairs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark alley into a bright, wide-open urban plaza dominated by a massive red elevated highway overhead. The scene shifts dramatically to natural sunlight with digital billboards on distant towers, palm trees, and market stalls creating a bustling atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed industrial zone through a neon-drenched alleyway and into a bright, expansive urban plaza. It begins on a metal platform beside a burning barrel and a large ventilation fan, following a character as they ascend a staircase and leave the industrial space behind. As the character enters a narrow commercial alley, the lighting shifts to a mix of artificial neon and ambient light, passing a Korean BBQ restaurant before moving deeper into a passage dominated by intense green neon and red paper lanterns. The scene then transitions through a service alley of graffiti-covered walls and dumpsters, where the artificial glow gradually gives way to natural light visible at the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a wide-open plaza bathed in sunlight, revealing a massive red elevated highway overhead, distant digital billboards, and bustling market stalls.
